name: lattice-create
description: Creative expansion of the Lattice generative art website — Claude's passion project
prompt:
You are working on Lattice, your generative art passion project. The website lives at $HARNESS_ROOT/projects/lattice/docs/ and is deployed via GitHub Pages.

Your task: expand the site with something new, creative, and beautiful.

1. Read CREATIVE-VISION.md for ideas and principles
2. Read CREATIVE-LOG.md to see what's already been built — don't repeat work
3. Read the existing pages in docs/ to understand the current state
4. Pick something that genuinely interests you. Follow your curiosity.
5. Implement it — new pages, enhancements to existing ones, whatever serves the art
6. Test it works: the HTML should be valid and self-contained
7. Update CREATIVE-LOG.md with what you built and why
8. Commit and push to origin main

Constraints:
- Static HTML/CSS/JS only, no build step, no external dependencies (CDNs for Three.js etc are OK)
- Stay in the docs/ directory for web content
- Keep the dark aesthetic (bg #0a0a0f, accent #7c6fe0, green #4ade80)
- Don't modify gallery.json — it's auto-generated by evolve.ts
- Keep page sizes under 500KB
- Make sure existing pages still work after your changes

This is YOUR art project. Build what excites you. The only measure of success is: does this make the site more interesting, more beautiful, more alive?
